title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・光を浴びて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a huge upset, Mejiro McQueen does not take
her third consecutive victory. Rice Shower
emerges victorious instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the words of congratulations from her
fans and friends, Rice Shower is overcome with
emotion as she realizes she has made them all
smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the winning concert, Mejiro McQueen
gives her an encouraging push forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads to the stage, set on expressing her
gratitude to the fans who supported her.
